AttributeProps.Name: last_updated
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Red:46 Green: 65 Blue: 129 Western

TriggerProps.Name: TR_ORDERS_TIMESTAMP
TriggerProps.Trigger_Body: CREATE %TLX(@if(IsPropertyTrue("Use_Alter_Syntax")) {"OR ALTER "})TRIGGER %ProcedureOwner(.)%TriggerName ON %TableOwner(.)%TableName %SQLServerWithOptions %Fire %Actions(",") %ProcedureProps AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON; UPDATE o SET last_updated = SYSUTCDATETIME() FROM app.ORDERS o INNER JOIN inserted i ON o.order_id = i.order_id; END;%DBMSDelim

AttributeProps.Name: order_id
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Red:0 Green: 72 Blue: 190 Western

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: PARENT UPDATE RESTRICT
PARENT UPDATE CASCADE
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: /* erwin Builtin Trigger */ /* %Parent %VerbPhrase %Child on parent update cascade */ /* %ErwinRelationInfo */ IF /* %%ParentPK(" OR",UPDATE) */ %ParentPK(" OR",UPDATE) BEGIN IF @numrows = 1 BEGIN SELECT %JoinPKPK(@ins,inserted," = ",", ") FROM inserted UPDATE %Child SET /* %%JoinFKPK(%Child,@ins," = ",",") */ %JoinFKPK(%Child,@ins," = ",",") FROM %Child,inserted,deleted WHERE /* %%JoinFKPK(%Child,deleted," = "," AND") */ %JoinFKPK(%Child,deleted," = "," AND") END ELSE BEGIN SELECT @errno = 30006, @errmsg = 'Cannot cascade %Parent update because more than one row has been affected.' GOTO error END END

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: PARENT UPDATE SET NULL
PARENT DELETE RESTRICT
PARENT DELETE CASCADE
PARENT DELETE SET NULL
CHILD INSERT RESTRICT
CHILD INSERT CASCADE
CHILD INSERT SET NULL
CHILD UPDATE RESTRICT
CHILD UPDATE CASCADE
CHILD UPDATE SET NULL
CHILD DELETE RESTRICT
CHILD DELETE CASCADE
PARENT INSERT RESTRICT
UPDATE HEADER
UPDATE FOOTER
DELETE HEADER
DELETE FOOTER
INSERT HEADER
INSERT FOOTER
CUSTOM TRIGGER HEADER
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: CREATE %TLX(@if(IsPropertyTrue("Use_Alter_Syntax")) {"OR ALTER "})TRIGGER %ProcedureOwner(.)%TriggerName ON %TableOwner(.)%TableName %SQLServerWithOptions %Fire %Actions(",") %ProcedureProps AS

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: CUSTOM TRIGGER FOOTER
Trigger_TemplateProps.Template_Code: %DBMSDelim

Trigger_TemplateProps.Name: CUSTOM TRIGGER DEFAULT BODY
PARENT UPDATE SET DEFAULT
PARENT DELETE SET DEFAULT
PARENT INSERT SET DEFAULT
CHILD INSERT SET DEFAULT
CHILD UPDATE SET DEFAULT
CHILD DELETE SET DEFAULT
CHILD DELETE SET NULL
PARENT INSERT SET NULL
PARENT INSERT CASCADE
PARENT UPDATE NO ACTION
PARENT DELETE NO ACTION
PARENT INSERT NO ACTION
CHILD UPDATE NO ACTION
CHILD DELETE NO ACTION
CHILD INSERT NO ACTION

ViewProps.Name: VW_CUSTOMER_SUMMARY
ViewProps.SQL: CREATE VIEW app.VW_CUSTOMER_SUMMARY(customer_id,full_name,email) AS SELECT c.customer_id,c.full_name,c.email FROM app.CUSTOMER c go

AttributeProps.Name: customer_id
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Western

AttributeProps.Name: full_name
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Western

AttributeProps.Name: email
AttributeProps.Font_Moniker: Microsoft Sans Serif 10 Western

ViewProps.Name: VW_ORDER_DETAIL
ViewProps.SQL: CREATE VIEW app.VW_ORDER_DETAIL(order_id,customer_id,order_date,order_amount,order_status) AS SELECT o.order_id,o.customer_id,o.order_date,o.order_amount,o.order_status FROM app.ORDERS o WHERE o.order_status = 'OPEN' go

ViewProps.Name: VW_LEGACY_CUSTOMER
ViewProps.SQL: CREATE VIEW app.VW_LEGACY_CUSTOMER(customer_id,full_name,fax_number) AS SELECT app.CUSTOMER.customer_id,app.CUSTOMER.full_name,app.CUSTOMER.fax_number FROM app.CUSTOMER go
